available_tools.name: build_topology_graph
available_tools.description: Build a topology graph from the active PowerFactory project.

available_tools.name: build_topology_inventory
available_tools.description: Build a typed inventory from the current PowerFactory topology graph.

available_tools.name: build_unified_inventory
available_tools.description: Build a unified non-topology PowerFactory inventory for supported object types.

available_tools.name: classify_data_source
available_tools.description: Classify whether the data query should use base data or load-flow result data.

available_tools.name: execute_change_load
available_tools.description: Apply a load change in PowerFactory and run load flow before/after.

available_tools.name: execute_switch_operation
available_tools.description: Execute an open/close/toggle operation on a resolved switch object in PowerFactory.

available_tools.name: get_load_catalog
available_tools.description: Read the available catalog of PowerFactory objects of the requested type from the active project.

available_tools.name: interpret_data_query_instruction
available_tools.description: Interpret a natural-language data query into a structured PowerFactory data-query instruction.

available_tools.name: interpret_entity_instruction
available_tools.description: Interpret a natural-language topology request into a structured generic PowerFactory entity instruction.

available_tools.name: interpret_instruction
available_tools.description: Interpret a natural-language user request into a structured load-change instruction.

available_tools.name: interpret_switch_instruction
available_tools.description: Interpret a natural-language switch request into a structured switch operation instruction.

available_tools.name: list_available_object_attributes
available_tools.description: List semantic and raw attribute options for the selected PowerFactory object.

available_tools.name: query_topology_neighbors
available_tools.description: Query the direct neighbors of an asset in the PowerFactory topology graph.

available_tools.name: read_pf_object_attributes
available_tools.description: Read selected attributes from a resolved PowerFactory object with dynamic loadflow fallback.
domain_notes: Do not use this step before attribute selection is available.

available_tools.name: resolve_entity_from_inventory
available_tools.description: Resolve the requested generic asset from a typed topology inventory.

available_tools.name: resolve_load
available_tools.description: Resolve the target load object inside the active PowerFactory project.

available_tools.name: resolve_objects_from_inventory_llm
available_tools.description: Resolve PowerFactory objects by LLM-based exact candidate selection from a unified non-topology inventory.

available_tools.name: select_pf_object_attributes_llm
available_tools.description: Select the best matching attribute handles from the available option list.

available_tools.name: summarize_load_catalog
available_tools.description: Build a concise user-facing catalog answer.

available_tools.name: summarize_pf_object_data_result
available_tools.description: Summarize queried PowerFactory object data for the end user.

available_tools.name: summarize_powerfactory_result
available_tools.description: Summarize result data from a PowerFactory load workflow for the end user.

available_tools.name: summarize_switch_result
available_tools.description: Summarize the result of a switch state change for the end user.

available_tools.name: summarize_topology_result
available_tools.description: Build a concise user-facing topology answer.

available_tools.name: unsupported_request
available_tools.description: Return a controlled message for unsupported PowerFactory intent.

result.answer:
Die Schalteroperation für Schalter 1 wurde ausgeführt, aber der Zustand änderte sich nicht (vorher: offen, nachher: offen). Anschließend wurde ein Lastfluss gerechnet. Die Busspannungen liegen alle innerhalb der zulässigen Grenzen (Umin=0.95 p.u., Umax=1.05 p.u.). Die Änderungen an den Spannungen sind minimal:

- **Bus 1:** Keine Veränderung, 1.0400 p.u.
- **Bus 2:** Keine Veränderung, 1.0250 p.u.
- **Bus 3:** Keine Veränderung, 1.0250 p.u.
- **Bus 4:** Verringert um -0.0013 p.u., 1.0196 p.u.
- **Bus 5:** Verringert um -0.0035 p.u., 0.9954 p.u.
- **Bus 6:** Verringert um -0.0010 p.u., 0.9977 p.u.
- **Bus 7:** Verringert um -0.0001 p.u., 1.0183 p.u.
- **Bus 8:** Verringert um -0.0001 p.u., 1.0038 p.u.
- **Bus 9:** Verringert um -0.0002 p.u., 1.0249 p.u.

Alle Spannungen sind innerhalb der zulässigen Grenzen.
